name: Curiosity
fact: Mars Science Laboratory. RTG-powered (no solar reliance), car-sized (899 kg), still operational over a decade after landing. Confirmed Gale Crater hosted a habitable lake environment in the deep past. Climbing Mt. Sharp's stratigraphic sequence — billion-year-by-billion-year readings of Mars's environmental history.
capability: First nuclear-powered Mars rover; first to confirm a past habitable environment on Mars.
